title: Genshin Visions
description: Palladium addon adds Genshin Impact Visions
body:
This Palladium Addon is based on the game Genshin Impact 
you can obtain a vision by killing a **Husk**
there are seven types of visions you can get
- Anemo = air
- Geo = rock
- Electro = lightning
- Hydro = water
- Pyro = fire
- Cryo = ice

You can choose between Magic, Long Range, Or Close Range.
